subject: Gaming
title: Mental Health in Esports
description: Learn Mental Health in Esports in one minute.

hook.text: Burnout, anxiety, and depression affect esports pros at alarming rates. The pressure is immense.

buildup.text: Pro players practice 12-16 hours daily. Social isolation and performance anxiety are constant.

discovery.text: Teams are hiring sports psychologists and wellness coaches. Mental health is becoming a priority.

twist.text: Multiple top players have retired young citing mental health. Some were under 22 years old.

climax.text: The industry is slowly recognizing that player wellness determines the sustainability of careers.

punchline.text: Twelve-hour practice days. Burnout by 22. Esports is learning the hard way.

quiz.question: What mental health challenges do esports professionals face?
options: Burnout from 12-16 hour practice days, anxiety, and social isolation
